## What does this PR do?

- [ ] Adds new error pattern(s)
- [ ] Fixes existing pattern
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry has a unique `id`
- [ ] `regex` matches the error correctly
- [ ] `fixes` are actionable (not just "read docs")
- [ ] Tested with the CLI: `npx tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts "error message"`
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing pattern
